args.Description: Fix wazuh-stream deadlock where it skips building HTML if files haven't changed but the LLM hasn't run yet.
args.Instruction: Force changed=True if the LLM cache is completely uninitialized (i.e., script just started).
args.ReplacementContent:
if not changed and _LAST_PREVIEW_STATE["output_state"] is not None and _LLM_SUMMARY_CACHE == _LAST_PREVIEW_STATE["llm_summary_cache"]:
        return current_file_states
args.TargetContent:
if not changed and _LLM_SUMMARY_CACHE == _LAST_PREVIEW_STATE["llm_summary_cache"]:
        return current_file_states
args.toolAction: Fixing dashboard cache deadlock in wazuh_preview.py
